## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## How I tested

- [ ] `npm test` passes (engine + bots + UI)
- [ ] `npm run build:html` succeeds
- [ ] Manually checked on a device/emulator (if UI-facing)

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not hand-edit `assets/app.html` (it's generated by `build.js`)
- [ ] No hidden-info leak: the secret / Chameleon never shows on a shared screen
- [ ] If I touched topics/bots: every topic still has a clean 16-entry `BOT_CLUES` set
- [ ] Botless play is unchanged (bots are additive)
